About

Creative mind.
Operational precision.

As a creative strategist based in San Diego, I specialize in bridging the gap between event coordinators and vendors, where vision and execution fall out of sync. From managing large-scale logistics to creating content across digital platforms, my work lives at the intersection of strategy, aesthetics, and human connection — whether that's facilitating an event, building a campaign, or telling a story through a lens. I'm drawn to brands and teams that care about craft, culture, and impact.

Services

What I offer

01
Event Production

End-to-end event execution — from concept and vendor coordination to day-of logistics and post-event recap. Ensuring vision and reality stay aligned at every step.

02
Content Creation

Photo, video, and short-form content designed for digital platforms. Visual storytelling that captures atmosphere, brand, and moment with intention.

03
Marketing & PR

Brand campaigns, strategy, and communications that connect. From campaign ideation to press outreach — building presence that resonates and lasts.
